title: HPERSIST
description: Removes the expiration time for each specified field
complexity: O(N) where N is the number of specified fields

sections.title: Redis Software and Redis Cloud compatibility

content:
Remove the existing expiration on a hash key's field(s), turning the field(s) from _volatile_ (a field with expiration set) to _persistent_ (a field that will never expire as no TTL (time to live) is associated). ## Examples ``` redis> HSET mykey field1 "hello" field2 "world" (integer) 2 redis> HEXPIRE mykey 300 FIELDS 2 field1 field2 1) (integer) 1 2) (integer) 1 redis> HTTL mykey FIELDS 2 field1 field2 1) (integer) 283 2) (integer) 283 redis> HPERSIST mykey FIELDS 1 field2 1) (integer) 1 redis> HTTL mykey FIELDS 2 field1 field2 1) (integer) 268 2) (integer) -1 ``` ## Redis Software and Redis Cloud compatibility | Redis
Software | Redis
Cloud | Notes | |:----------------------|:-----------------|:------| | ✅ Standard
✅ Active-Active | ✅ Standard
✅ Active-Active | | ## Return information **RESP2:** * [Array reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#arrays). For each field: - [Integer reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#integers): `-2` if no such field exists in the provided hash key, or the provided key does not exist. - [Integer reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#integers): `-1` if the field exists but has no associated expiration set. - [Integer reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#integers): `1` the expiration was removed. **RESP3:** * [Array reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#arrays). For each field: - [Integer reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#integers): `-2` if no such field exists in the provided hash key, or the provided key does not exist. - [Integer reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#integers): `-1` if the field exists but has no associated expiration set. - [Integer reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#integers): `1` the expiration was removed.
intro:
Remove the existing expiration on a hash key's field(s), turning the field(s) from _volatile_ (a field
with expiration set) to _persistent_ (a field that will never expire as no TTL (time to live)
is associated).

sections.title: Overview
sections.content:
Remove the existing expiration on a hash key's field(s), turning the field(s) from _volatile_ (a field
with expiration set) to _persistent_ (a field that will never expire as no TTL (time to live)
is associated).

sections.title: Examples
sections.content:
```
redis> HSET mykey field1 "hello" field2 "world"
(integer) 2
redis> HEXPIRE mykey 300 FIELDS 2 field1 field2
1) (integer) 1
2) (integer) 1
redis> HTTL mykey FIELDS 2 field1 field2
1) (integer) 283
2) (integer) 283
redis> HPERSIST mykey FIELDS 1 field2
1) (integer) 1
redis> HTTL mykey FIELDS 2 field1 field2
1) (integer) 268
2) (integer) -1
```

sections.title: Redis Software and Redis Cloud compatibility
sections.content:
| Redis
Software | Redis
Cloud | Notes | |:----------------------|:-----------------|:------| | ✅ Standard
✅ Active-Active | ✅ Standard
✅ Active-Active | |

sections.title: Return information
sections.content:
**RESP2:**

* [Array reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#arrays). For each field:
    - [Integer reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#integers): `-2` if no such field exists in the provided hash key, or the provided key does not exist.
    - [Integer reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#integers): `-1` if the field exists but has no associated expiration set.
    - [Integer reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#integers): `1` the expiration was removed.

**RESP3:**

* [Array reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#arrays). For each field:
    - [Integer reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#integers): `-2` if no such field exists in the provided hash key, or the provided key does not exist.
    - [Integer reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#integers): `-1` if the field exists but has no associated expiration set.
    - [Integer reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#integers): `1` the expiration was removed.
